description: Style Note Referencing the distressed leather aesthetic of the Wild West, this pair of sandals from red tape are crafted to add a subtle polish to your off-duty ensemble. Wear this with rolled up jeans and an understated tee. Product Details Round toed sandal with a wide strap that covers the midfoot and forefoot with decorative stitch detailing Soft, padded nubuck footbed TPU outsole upraised at the heel, arched at the midfoot with multidirectional lugs Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
